The autotune achieved 0.6044 accuracy with a 96.8 MB model. Still below 0.62 target. I need to try harder. Let me run autotune for 10 minutes to get more trials, and also try manual training with trigrams.

{"analysis":"Autotune got 0.6044 accuracy with 96.8 MB model. Still below 0.62 target. Need to improve. Options: 1) Run autotune longer (10 min), 2) Try wordNgrams=3 with small dim, 3) Try ova loss. Let me try a combined approach - autotune for 10 minutes to find better params.","plan":"Run autotune for 10 minutes on full data with no char n-grams, which should allow more trials and find better hyperparameters.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cat > /app/autotune2.py << 'PYEOF'
import fasttext
import os

print('Autotune 10min...', flush=True)
model = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/app/train_full.txt',
    autotuneValidationFile='/app/test.txt',
    autotuneDuration=600,
    thread=4,
    verbose=2,
    minn=0,
    maxn=0
)

print('\nEvaluating...', flush=True)
n, p, r = model.test('/app/test.txt')
print(f'Acc: {p:.4f}', flush=True)

model.save_model('/app/model_best.bin')
sz = os.path.getsize('/app/model_best.bin') / (1024*1024)
print(f'Size: {sz:.1f} MB', flush=True)

if sz > 150:
    print('Quantizing...', flush=True)
    model.quantize(input='/app/train_full.txt', retrain=True, epoch=10, lr=0.25, thread=4, dsub=2, qnorm=True)
    model.save_model('/app/model.bin')
    sz2 = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / (1024*1024)
    n, p, r = model.test('/app/test.txt')
    print(f'Quant: sz={sz2:.1f}MB acc={p:.4f}', flush=True)
else:
    os.rename('/app/model_best.bin', '/app/model.bin')
    print(f'Saved /app/model.bin ({sz:.1f} MB)', flush=True)

print('DONE', flush=True)
PYEOF
","duration":0.5},{"keystrokes":"PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 python3 /app/autotune2.py
","duration":900.0}]}
